# 🕊️ Daedalus Pull Request

## **Description**

## **Type of Change**

- [ ] 🛠️ Refactor (modernizing C++ code/idioms)
- [ ] ✨ New Feature (new ML algorithm or utility)
- [ ] 🐛 Bug Fix (fixing memory leaks, segfaults, or math errors)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation/Chore update

### **How Has This Been Tested?**

- [ ] Added/Updated Python tests in `tests/`
- [ ] Verified C++ logic via manual examples
- [ ] Ran `pytest` and all tests passed

### **Checklist**

- [ ] My code follows the **[Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)**.
- [ ] My Code follows the **[Contributing](../CONTRIBUTING.md)** 
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas (Doxygen style).
